gitignoreGenerator.bannerMessage.default: File created using '.gitignore Generator' for Visual Studio Code: https://bit.ly/vscode-gig
gitignoreGenerator.bannerMessage.description: Custom banner message to include at the top of generated .gitignore files

gitignoreGenerator.customRulesHeader.default: Custom rules (everything added here won't be overriden by 'Generate .gitignore File' if you use 'Update' option)
gitignoreGenerator.customRulesHeader.description: Header comment for the custom rules section

gitignoreGenerator.autoGeneratedHeader.description: Header comment for the auto-generated templates section

gitignoreGenerator.primaryApiUrl.description: Primary API URL for fetching gitignore templates

gitignoreGenerator.fallbackApiUrl.description: Fallback API URL for fetching gitignore templates

gitignoreGenerator.githubRepository.description: GitHub gitignore repository URL for fetching templates

enumDescriptions: GitHub repository (fast, community-maintained, with retry logic)
Fallback API - backup source for resilience
gitignoreGenerator.preferredSource.description: Preferred source for fetching .gitignore templates. Uses automatic fallback chain if preferred source is unavailable.

gitignoreGenerator.autoSelectMode.description: Automatically select Override for directories without .gitignore, Update for directories with .gitignore. When false, always prompt user to choose.

gitignoreGenerator.requestTimeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds for network requests to template sources (default: 10000ms)

gitignoreGenerator.maxRetries.description: Maximum number of retry attempts per source before falling back to next source

gitignoreGenerator.enableDebugLogging.description: Enable detailed debug logging for network requests and retry logic (check Debug Console)

gitignoreGenerator.showFallbackNotificat.description: Show info notification when falling back from preferred source to alternative source

gitignoreGenerator.includeMetadata.description: Include generation timestamp, templates list, and source attribution in generated .gitignore files

gitignoreGenerator.includeDocumentation.description: Include 'How to maintain this file' documentation section in generated .gitignore files

gitignoreGenerator.preferGitHub.deprecationMessage: Use gitignoreGenerator.preferredSource instead (deprecated in v1.1.0, will be removed in v2.0.0)
gitignoreGenerator.preferGitHub.description: [DEPRECATED] Prefer GitHub gitignore repository as primary source. Use preferredSource instead.
